name_en: Large Size 41×34×19cm New Pure Black This ONTHEGO has been hard to buy since its release and is my No. 1! Attention to those who want a large bag! The latest full-leather series, cool and steady black, practical, classic, versatile, and spacious. The super durable leather + large capacity means it is not limited by seasons or travel! As I said, this quality would sell for multiple times the price on a proxy platform. Our price and quality have an absolute advantage for boutique lovers. Unbeatable price + authentic channel quality. Buy it now!!
